mapper.select:
SELECT E.PERSON_ID, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(E.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPTNAME, E.POST_GRADE_NAME FROM HR_EMPLOYEE E WHERE E.ACTIVITY = 1
AND (CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(E.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{affirmorKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' OR E.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{affirmorKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
ORDER BY E.EMPID ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO EVS_AFFIRM T USING ( SELECT #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS OBJ_SEQ, 1 AS AFFIRM_LEVEL, #{personId1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS AFFIRMOR_ID FROM DUAL WHERE #{personId1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2, #{personId2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM DUAL WHERE #{personId2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 3, #{personId3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM DUAL WHERE #{personId3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 4, #{personId4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM DUAL WHERE #{personId4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NOT NULL ) S ON (T.OBJ_SEQ = S.OBJ_SEQ AND T.AFFIRM_LEVEL = S.AFFIRM_LEVEL) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.AFFIRMOR_ID = S.AFFIRMOR_ID, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (OBJ_SEQ, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRMOR_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE) VALUES (S.OBJ_SEQ, S.AFFIRM_LEVEL, S.AFFIRMOR_ID, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
